g.text: Go pick glowberries by the bramble patch...
Go invite your friends at the willow.
Go cut reeds for lantern frames.
Go ask the bees for honey cakes.
Head back to the clearing for now.
Go fetch the old paper lanterns.
Go back to the clearing for now.
Go ask the cricket band to play.
Go back to the clearing first.
Carry the glowberries to the meadow.
Go back to the clearing for more.
Knock gently on the willow door.
Lead your friends to the meadow.
Pop back to the clearing first.
Weave the frames here by the pond.
Carry the bundle back to the clearing.
Carry the lantern frames to the meadow.
Wait politely for the honey cakes.
Carry the honey cakes to the meadow.
Dust off the old paper lanterns.
Carry the paper lanterns to the meadow.
Ask the crickets to follow you now.
Lead the cricket band to the meadow.
Make one last trip to the clearing.
Hang the lanterns in the great oak.
Keep the lanterns in the oak.
Light the first lantern and begin.
Sing the festival into the night.
Let the happy feast roll on.
